violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Manual measurements reviewed with staff during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
Deceased insects were observed in insect control devices (glue traps). Insect control devices to be removed at a frequency to prevent other pest attraction. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
Laminate lining for several shelves were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026
Gaskets for 1 door lowboy was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in donut room have an accumulation of food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The ceiling and walls and AC unit in the food prep area was observed with an accumulation of dust . The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
Per interview of staff, the back room is now used to prepare donuts. Walls shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2022

-Several floor tiles were observed cracked in refrigeration area. -Several ceiling tiles were observed with water damage. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025
